title: Vespula Avionics Module
subtitle: Flight System Avionics Module for engine actuation, sensing, and vehicle control
stackup: Six copper-layer avionics module PCB exported from Altium Gerbers
summary: Lead electrical design for the Flight System Avionics Module, the flight engine controller responsible for actuation and sensing across the rocket's 48 V avionics bus. The board drives solenoid valves and ignitors while reading differential sensors, RTDs, and pressure transducers for engine start and shutdown control.
mainConstraints: Correct inherited schematic faults including driven boot pins and flipped ADC signals
Restore stable ignitor power and converter compensation
Rework BeagleBone pin mapping while preserving vehicle control interfaces
Separate high-current actuation paths from low-level sensor acquisition
Validate reliable ignition, valve, and sensor operation after redesign
publicNote: Layout Gerbers and 3D model are connected. Add exported schematic PDF/SVG pages, BOM, pick-and-place, and lab evidence as the design package matures.
